query: SELECT id, name, slug, crmType, crmConnected, subscriptionTier, subscriptionStatus FROM tenants WHERE id IN (780001, 780004) OR name LIKE '%Test Wholesalers%' OR name LIKE '%Settings Test%' ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, name, slug, crmType, crmConnected, subscriptionTier, subscriptionStatus FROM tenants WHERE id IN (780001, 780004) OR name LIKE '%Test Wholesalers%' OR name LIKE '%Settings Test%' ORDER BY id;
